examples: His cardiologist offered a grim diagnosis.
Then the cardiologist tested my younger brother and me for the disease.
The cardiologist was reportedly offered $150,000 a month to look after Jackson.
"I'm very happy to see it, " says Jim Stein, a cardiologist at the University of Wisconsin.
His cardiologist and ophthalmologist advised he continue using Lucentis after he suffered two heart attacks.
